data.name: Home_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Official telemetry platform for Cosmic Diner. Explore live community activity, global performance insights, and your personal player profile.

data.name: Home_CommunitySessionsDescription
data.value: Total matches and telemetry sessions recorded.

data.name: Sidebar_GuestDescription
data.value: Explore the platform and create your account to unlock your operator profile.

data.name: Sidebar_UserDescription
data.value: Your personal player block lives in Home. Use it as your entry point into the platform.

data.name: Sidebar_AdminDescription
data.value: Administrative access enabled. Internal telemetry modules are available.

data.name: Dashboard_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Live monitoring of sessions, installations, and operational game telemetry.

data.name: Dashboard_KpiRegisteredInstallationsSubtitle
data.value: Persisted in SQL Server through the API

data.name: Dashboard_KpiActiveSessionsSubtitle
data.value: Current active sessions reported by the backend

data.name: LiveOps_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Real-time fleet status, active sessions, event volume and operational alerts.

data.name: LiveOps_NoInstallationsDescription
data.value: Installation cards will appear when Unity clients connect.

data.name: Alerts_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Centralized monitoring of automatic alerts generated by anomalies and critical telemetry events.

data.name: Analytics_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Aggregated gameplay telemetry metrics calculated directly in SQL Server.

data.name: Analytics_NoDataDescription
data.value: No session events match the selected build and date range.

data.name: Builds_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Centralized registry of monitored Cosmic Diner builds and release versions.

data.name: Builds_SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by Version Number or Engine Version

data.name: Installations_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Centralized inventory of registered devices and hardware profiles captured from Cosmic Diner installations.

data.name: Installations_SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by Installation ID or Device Name

data.name: ProfileSessionDetail_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Technical summary and chronological event timeline for a Cosmic Diner session linked to your owned installation.

data.name: ProfileSessionDetail_NoEventsDescription
data.value: This session exists, but the Unity client has not reported gameplay events for it yet.

data.name: ProfileSessionDetail_TimelineDescription
data.value: Ordered gameplay telemetry events received from the Cosmic Diner Unity client.

data.name: ProfileSessions_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Review gameplay sessions linked exclusively to your owned Cosmic Diner installations.

data.name: ProfileSessions_NoSessionsDescription
data.value: Once your linked Cosmic Diner installations start sending telemetry, your personal session history will appear here.

data.name: Profile_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Premium player profile for Cosmic Diner telemetry ownership and personal gameplay visibility.

data.name: Profile_LinkSubtitle
data.value: Paste the Installation ID shown by the game client to link that device to your Echo Console profile. The user identifier is read from your secure session and is never submitted by the browser.

data.name: Profile_NoLinkedDevicesDescription
data.value: Paste the Installation ID from Cosmic Diner in the ownership panel above to link your first device.

data.name: Profile_OwnedDevicesSubtitle
data.value: These devices are currently linked to your Echo Console account through the ownership system.

data.name: Profile_SettingsSubtitle
data.value: Update your public operator identity. Role and account status are protected system fields and cannot be modified here.

data.name: Profile_UnlinkConfirm
data.value: This will unlink the device from your account. Historical sessions will be preserved. Continue?

data.name: SessionEvents_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Administrative view of gameplay telemetry events received from every Cosmic Diner installation.

data.name: SessionEvents_NoEventsDescription
data.value: No session events match the current administrative filters.

data.name: SessionTimeline_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Chronological reconstruction of the gameplay events received during this Cosmic Diner session.

data.name: SessionTimeline_NoEventsDescription
data.value: This session exists, but the Unity client did not send timeline events.

data.name: SessionTimeline_TimelineDescription
data.value: Events are ordered from the beginning of the session to the most recent telemetry point.

data.name: Users_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Administrative directory of system users, roles, and account states for the EchoConsole platform.

data.name: Presentation_EnableDescription
data.value: Hide secondary chrome and enlarge the dashboard for a live presentation.

data.name: Auth_LoginDescription
data.value: Sign in to access the Echo Console platform and continue into the telemetry control experience.

data.name: Auth_RegisterDescription
data.value: Create a local account to build your player profile inside the Echo Console platform.

data.name: Auth_AliasAlreadyUsed
data.value: This alias is already in use.

data.name: Auth_RegistrationFailed
data.value: The account could not be created. Review the form and try again.

data.name: Auth_PasswordRequiresDigit
data.value: The password must include a number.

data.name: Auth_PasswordRequiresLower
data.value: The password must include a lowercase letter.

data.name: Auth_PasswordRequiresUpper
data.value: The password must include an uppercase letter.

data.name: Auth_PasswordRequiresSymbol
data.value: The password must include a symbol.

data.name: Auth_AccessDeniedDescription
data.value: Your current account does not have the required administrator privileges to access this telemetry module.

data.name: Error_Title
data.value: The control station encountered an error

data.name: Error_Description
data.value: The requested operation could not be completed. Retry the request or return to the home module.

data.name: Privacy_Description
data.value: Echo Console processes technical gameplay telemetry to operate dashboards, diagnostics and player-facing history.

data.name: Privacy_TelemetryDescription
data.value: Telemetry is limited to operational game data such as sessions, scenes, events, builds and device status.

data.name: Privacy_SecurityDescription
data.value: Session tokens and administrative credentials are never displayed in the interface or included in gameplay payloads.

data.name: Validation_Email
data.value: The {0} field is not a valid email address.

data.name: Validation_MaxLength
data.value: The {0} field must be a string with a maximum length of {1}.

data.name: Validation_StringLength
data.value: The {0} field must be a string with a minimum length of {2} and a maximum length of {1}.

data.name: Footer_Description
data.value: Cosmic Diner is an analog-horror exploration game set inside an abandoned retro-futuristic restaurant. Follow the official channels for development signals and new transmissions.

data.name: Footer_LinkPending
data.value: Configure the official URL in ExternalLinks settings.

data.name: Home_CommercialHeroDescription
data.value: The lights are failing. The kitchen is silent. Something in the dining room is still waiting for service. Enter an abandoned space-age restaurant and survive the transmission.

data.name: Home_WishlistButton
data.value: Add Cosmic Diner to your Wishlist

data.name: Home_LiveReadoutDescription
data.value: Echo Console is receiving operational telemetry from active Cosmic Diner installations.

data.name: Home_ShowcaseTitle
data.value: A diner built for the stars. Abandoned for a reason.

data.name: Home_ShowcaseIntro
data.value: Replace the terminal placeholders with final gameplay captures. The layout is ready for cinematic screenshots, environmental storytelling and store-page copy.

data.name: Home_ShowcaseOneTitle
data.value: Your shift begins after closing time

data.name: Home_ShowcaseOneDescription
data.value: Explore a retro-futuristic restaurant frozen in the remains of the space race. Search offices, storage rooms and silent dining halls while the building reacts to your presence.

data.name: Home_ShowcaseOneAlt
data.value: Gameplay screenshot placeholder showing the Cosmic Diner interior

data.name: Home_ShowcaseTwoTitle
data.value: Light is a tool, a warning and a risk

data.name: Home_ShowcaseTwoDescription
data.value: Manage batteries, restore failing systems and use the flashlight carefully. Every powered circuit reveals another part of the diner, and may reveal you in return.

data.name: Home_ShowcaseTwoAlt
data.value: Gameplay screenshot placeholder showing a blackout sequence

data.name: Home_ShowcaseThreeTitle
data.value: The astronaut is not part of the attraction

data.name: Home_ShowcaseThreeDescription
data.value: Listen for movement beyond the walls, hide when the route closes and reconstruct what happened through photographs, objects and corrupted recordings.

data.name: Home_ShowcaseThreeAlt
data.value: Gameplay screenshot placeholder showing an enemy encounter

data.name: Home_ChangelogDescription
data.value: These records describe the evolution of the Cosmic Diner videogame, not the Echo Console website.

data.name: Home_ChangelogV01Description
data.value: Initial exploration loop, diner navigation, object interaction and the first playable progression route.

data.name: Home_ChangelogV02Description
data.value: Flashlight and battery systems, dynamic physical props, power restoration and environmental audio feedback.

data.name: Home_ChangelogV03Description
data.value: Enemy encounters, hiding logic, tension systems and expanded narrative evidence throughout the restaurant.

data.name: Home_CorruptedData
data.value: [// DATA_CORRUPTED: WE ARE WAITING FOR YOU //]
